titles.title: I Will Lift My Hands in Praise

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: So many reasons to be thankful for, Jesus, you are so so good, You have been so kind and merciful, Father you have delivered me

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: And I will lift my hands in praise To the one who gave me life, Jesus, I thank you, Jesus, I thank you, You have always stand beside me, You've seen the tears I cry, You are the solid rock on which I stand.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: My strong tower my refuge in the storm, Jesus, you are so so good, You delivered me from my enemies, You've won the battle the victory is yours.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: And I will lift my hands in Praise To the one who gave me life Jesus I thank you Jesus I thank you You have always stand beside me You've seen the tears I cry You are the solid rock on which I stand.

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: How awesome is your name the name above all name, Lord, you fight my every battle, Blessed be the name of the Lord For I am surrounded by your grace and love, That flows right from your heart, Father I thank Father I thank you.
